name: O-3 (SS-64)
events: 27 Sep 1942 USS O-3 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
28 Sep 1942 USS O-3 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
2 Nov 1942 USS O-3 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
3 Nov 1942 USS O-3 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
14 Feb 1943 USS O-3 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
15 Feb 1943 USS O-3 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
26 Feb 1943 USS O-3 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
27 Feb 1943 USS O-3 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
24 Aug 1945 USS O-3 departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard for decommissioning.
25 Aug 1945 USS O-3 arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for decommissioning.
